title: Retail Sales Associate
description:
Do you have a passion for Retail? Do you enjoy serving customers and getting a sense of satisfaction when you see the smiles on their faces? If YES, join us now as a Retail Sales Associate, we want YOU!

Our Retail Sales Associate will undergo intensive training program to be competent in all aspects of retail management, visual merchandising, customer service, inventory management and operations, delivering service excellence to our customers. You will understand how the retail industry works and we will equip you with the necessary skills and knowledge to excel!

Job Benefits

  • Attractive Salary Package
  • Performance Bonus
  • Monthly Incentives
  • Personal Commission
  • Shop Commission
  • Medical and Dental Benefits
  • Free Company Products
  • Staff Discounts
  • Birthday and Welfare Benefits
  • Referral Incentives
  • And More!!!

Responsibilities:

· Greet and welcome customers as they enter the store, creating a friendly and inviting atmosphere.

· Assist customers in finding the ideal products that suit their preferences and needs.

· Provide in-depth product knowledge and educate customers on the latest fashion trends, features, and unique selling points of our company products.

· Process sales transactions accurately and efficiently, handling cash, credit cards, and other payment methods.

· Meet and exceed individual and team sales targets while maintaining high levels of customer satisfaction.

· Handle customer inquiries, complaints, and returns in a professional and courteous manner.

· Assist with housekeeping, inventory management, and conducting regular stock checks.


Requirements:

· Proven experience in retail sales, preferably in the fashion industry or footwear segment.

· Passion for fashion, footwear, and staying current with industry trends.

· Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage and connect with customers.

· Strong sales acumen and the ability to upsell products effectively.

· Customer-focused approach with a positive attitude and a willingness to go the extra mile for customer satisfaction.

· Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and handle multiple tasks efficiently.


Available Job Locations at:

  • Changi Airport (Transit Area)

  • Bugis Junction

  • Wisma Orchard

  • Vivo City

  • Jewel Changi Airport

postedCompany.description:
Company Overview

 

We are a fast growing chain-stores retailer of ladies fashion footwear. Established in 2001, PAZZION caters to the modern, sophisticated trend-setter with an uncompromising standard for taste and quality. High-caliber craftsmanship and an unwavering attention to detail mean each pair of shoes is painstakingly designed to bring you the best in style and comfort. PAZZION is available in major retail malls across SINGAPORE with its flagship outlet at Wisma Atria Orchard Road. Internationally, PAZZION’s presence can be found in Brunei, Cambodia, Indonesia, Japan, Mauritius, South Korea, Thailand and Vietnam.

 

Our Mission and Vision

 

PAZZION’s Vision is to establish itself as a recognizable international brand, known
for its high-quality products that push the envelope of fashion trends.

 

We aim to offer trendy, fashion-forward footwear and accessories with an
emphasis on quality, style and value.
